{ "cells": [ { "cell_type": "markdown", "metadata": {}, "source": [ "# Clustering trees using `mp3treesim`" ] }, { "cell_type": "markdown", "metadata": {}, "source": [ "### Import `mp3treesim` module installed via `pip`" ] }, { "cell_type": "code", "execution_count": 1, "metadata": {}, "outputs": [], "source": [ "import mp3treesim as mp3" ] }, { "cell_type": "markdown", "metadata": {}, "source": [ "### Load the example dataset in `examples/trees`" ] }, { "cell_type": "code", "execution_count": 2, "metadata": {}, "outputs": [], "source": [ "import glob\n", "trees = list()\n", "for file in glob.glob('trees/tree*.gv'):\n", " trees.append(mp3.read_dotfile(file))\n", "\n", "tot_trees = len(trees)" ] }, { "cell_type": "markdown", "metadata": {}, "source": [ "### Compute the similarity matrix of the trees" ] }, { "cell_type": "code", "execution_count": 3, "metadata": {}, "outputs": [], "source": [ "import numpy as np\n", "sim_matrix = np.zeros((tot_trees, tot_trees))\n", "\n", "for index, _ in np.ndenumerate(sim_matrix):\n", " i, j = index\n", " sim_matrix[index] = mp3.similarity(trees[i], trees[j])" ] }, { "cell_type": "markdown", "metadata": {}, "source": [ "### Plot clustering using `seaborn`" ] }, { "cell_type": "code", "execution_count": 5, "metadata": { "scrolled": false }, "outputs": [ { "data": { "image/png": "
